rationale: The citing paper’s central contribution is evaluating promotions/nudges on both purchases and returns (including return-adjusted net sales), and the cited 2020 paper specifically examines how a promotion (free shipping) increases returns and affects profitability. Given this strong conceptual overlap on promotion-induced returns and economic consequences—and a confirmed DOI match in the reference list—this citation is plausibly foundational/comparative rather than an obvious incidental mention.
